summary: P0 Bug Fix Validated - Branch Filter Items. All 10 tests PASSED. Filter Cabang NO LONGER reduces item count. Total items = 176 for all branch filters (Semua, HQ, 3 FRONT).
bug_description: P0 BUG: Saat filter Cabang = Headquarters, daftar item menjadi 0 (kosong). Root cause: branch_id sebelumnya digunakan sebagai filter query items, sekarang diperbaiki hanya untuk stock lookup dari product_stocks.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ FIX VERIFIED: branch_id no longer filters items query in master_erp.py
✅ Stock lookup now correctly uses product_stocks collection
✅ All 176 items displayed regardless of branch filter
✅ Stock values correctly differ per branch (0 if no stock in that branch)
✅ Architecture matches FINAL specification: items from 'items' collection, stock from 'product_stocks'
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Branch Filter bug FIXED and validated. Items endpoint now correctly: (1) Returns ALL items regardless of branch_id filter, (2) Uses branch_id only for stock lookup from product_stocks, (3) Shows stock=0 for items without stock in selected branch.

test_02_items_with_hq_branch_filter_stil.detail: HQ filter - Total items: 176, Fetched: 176 (P0 BUG FIXED - was returning 0)

test_04_item_counts_consistent_across_br.detail: Item counts - No filter: 176, HQ: 176, 3 FRONT: 176

test_05_stock_values_differ_per_branch.detail: Stock lookup working correctly per branch

test_07_voucer_isat_zero_stock_validatio.detail: VOUCER ISAT ZERO: Semua Cabang stock=28508

test_08_items_response_structure.detail: Response contains all required fields including stock, available, stock_branch_id

test_09_empty_branch_id_same_as_no_filte.detail: Empty branch_id total: 176 (same as no filter)

architecture_validation.branch_id_filter_behavior: Only affects stock lookup, NOT item filtering ✅
architecture_validation.cabang_specific: Shows stock only for that branch (0 if none) ✅
